item.title: About
item.description: I’m Berkay, also known as bekoo. I am a 19-year-old researcher dedicated to understanding systems at the lowest level. Over the past 4 years, I have focused on Reverse Engineering, Malware Analysis, and Malware Development. Recently, I have expanded my research into Firmware Engineering and UEFI Development to explore computer architecture beyond the operating system. Recently, i moved on the waters of Windows. Important: All content is strictly for educational purposes.
